subject: docs(todo): update Phase 5 item to reflect completed trend detection
body:
Trend detection via Holt's double exponential smoothing is already
implemented in forecast.ts. Linear regression was explicitly rejected.
Updated TODO to show only remaining work: parameter auto-tuning and
bonus metrics.
